display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.title: 2026 IIHF World Championship
programme.desc: From BCF Arena in Fribourg, Switzerland.

programme.title: Live: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: Live: NHL Now
programme.desc: A front row seat to the news and happenings from around the league, as hosts E.J. Hradek and Jackie Redmond, along with NHL Insiders, set up for a night of NHL game action.

programme.title: Live: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.title: Live: 2026 Memorial Cup Hockey
programme.desc: From Prospera Place in Kelowna, British Columbia.

programme.title: Live: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.desc: From Swiss Life Arena in Zürich, Switzerland.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.title: NHL Network Countdown
programme.desc: NHL Network counts down great plays and memorable moments in hockey history.

programme.title: Live: 2026 IIHF World Championship
programme.desc: From Swiss Life Arena in Zürich, Switzerland.

programme.title: NHL Network Originals: Picture Perfect - The 1992-93 Season
programme.desc: The 25th anniversary of "the most remarkable season in NHL history.".

programme.title: Hawkeytown: Portland to the Pros
programme.desc: The story of players achieving their dream of playing in the NHL.

programme.title: Live: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: James Holzhauer's down-to-the finals contest against Emma Boettcher.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Jane Seymour, Kate Walsh share their skin secrets
programme.desc: Crepe Erase Ultra visibly transforms your skin with 9 super hydrators! Tune in to see how Jane Seymour and Kate Walsh keep their skin so smooth. Treat and repair the look of crepey skin.Shop at CrepeErase.com.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Sleep Deeper Tonight with DREAMCLOUD's Advanced Hybrid Mattress Today!
programme.desc: Treat yourself to luxurious, award-winning comfort with the premium DreamCloud Mattress & adjustable base. Enjoy restorative sleep, relax with zero gravity comfort, and wake up refreshed. Plus, save 66% with this amazing deal today!

programme.title: Jane Seymour, Kate Walsh share their skin secrets
programme.desc: Crepe Erase Ultra visibly transforms your skin with 9 super hydrators! Tune in to see how Jane Seymour and Kate Walsh keep their skin so smooth. Treat and repair the look of crepey skin.Shop at CrepeErase.com.

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. The contestant with the most points at the end of the game advances to play the bonus round, in which the contestant has a chance to win thousands of dollars, with the actual amount dependent on the rules in place at the time of

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Two teams of three compete to complete a chain of words after the first and last words in the chain are revealed.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Holding all the aces players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the close hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Aces For Everyone; players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants include Joel McHale, Rich Eisen, Jerry Ferrara and La La Anthony.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: A professional hairdresser from Cranston, R.I., plays for up to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Four million-dollar cases are on the board as contestants play to win cash; Aretha Franklin calls to support a music loving contestant; trainers Jillian Michaels and Bob Harper and casting director Bernard Telsey make special appearances.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Master Minds
programme.desc: Three challengers take on some of the great minds in trivia in a showdown of smarts and strategy; the last contestant standing will face off against the highest scoring Master Mind in a head-to-head battle.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Kevin, Arrin, Grant and Rhyan compete.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Cousins Latoya and Free battle friends Brian and Bruce.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: James Holzhauer returns as The Chaser as three new hopefuls compete.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Married couple Christiana and Nic from Door County, Wis., compete against the wall.

programme.title: Press Your Luck
programme.desc: Contestants from California and Missouri compete.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Husain Family vs. Porter Family.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Besties Joan and Wanda face off with husband and wife team Keila and BJ.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Players Jon, Paula, Jeff, and RJ.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.desc: Transform your bath affordably in just one day!

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Mercy Ships
programme.desc: Mercy Ship's crew of world-class medical volunteers sail across the globe providing lifesaving surgeries to those with nowhere else to turn.

programme.title: NECTAR TRI-PILLOW -Cooler, Comfy, Better Sleep! Buy One Get One FREE!
programme.desc: Discover the Nectar Tri-Comfort Cooling Pillow for the ultimate sleep experience! Adjustable to three firmness levels to provide customized support and cooling all night long. Order NOW to get a second pillow FREE, plus a 30-night home trial!

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: Emma: Natural Relief for Bloating, Constipation & Gut Imbalance
programme.desc: Tired of bloating or gut issues that won't go away?; discovering the root cause-and how Emma can help eliminate methane-producing archaea, reset digestion and restore balance naturally.

programme.title: 1776 Gold & Silver!
programme.desc: Secure one of the extremely limited 2026 Gold or Silver Continental Dollars graded MS70 celebrating America's 250th Anniversary. With mintages of just 499 gold and 999 silver, even fewer were struck than the historic original 1776 Continental Dollar.

programme.title: Operation Smile
programme.desc: Transforming lives and bringing smiles to children around the world.

programme.title: 25 Words or Less
programme.desc: The show where every word counts! Hosted by Meredith Vieira, two teams of celebrities and civilians face off in a fast-paced word game with a top prize of $10,000.

programme.title: Beat the Bridge
programme.desc: An interactive bridge dares players to cross by stepping on the right answers to challenging trivia questions; each step forward puts money in the team's bank, with bonus money for each successful crossing.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Switch
programme.desc: Jeff Hephner challenges contestants who are ranked based on their answers to trivia questions for a chance at $10,000; every question counts, as each answer can propel them to the top or to the bottom, where they'll be in jeopardy of elimination.

programme.title: Split Second
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins presents three contestants with a question and three possible choices and whoever buzzes in fastest earns the right to answer first.

programme.title: Tic Tac Dough
programme.desc: Brooke Burns hosts this exciting remake of the iconic game show, as two contestants compete head-to-head, answering trivia questions to earn plays on a giant game board, while the mischievous dragon tries to outwit their every move.

programme.title: Bingo Blitz
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli hosts this dynamic game of knowledge, strategy, and luck, where contestants answer trivia questions to earn bingo balls and unlock power-ups in their quest for the $10,000 prize.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: Two teams of friends and family race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Tracey family vs Howard family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Tracey family vs. Lampe family.

programme.title: Family Feud Favorites
programme.desc: "Family Feud" has seen some crazy moments over the years, so buckle up as we revisit these fan favorites.

programme.title: Celebrity Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Amanda Seales, Snoop Dogg and Mark Duplass.

programme.title: Celebrity Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Utkarsh Ambudkar, Mira Sorvino and Lisa Ann Walter.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Father and daughter John and Toni from Antioch, Calif., contend with the wall, hoping they have what it takes to win big.

programme.title: SIGN OFF
programme.desc: Sign off.

programme.title: SIGN OFF
programme.desc: Sign off.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: The week's most popular videos and social media highlights from across the Club, its players and supporters.

programme.desc: All the goals from Liverpool's Premier League season so far.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of the best Liverpool goals scored by Virgil Van Dijk.

programme.title: Press Box
programme.desc: Members of the local press pack discuss all things LFC and debate some of the current wider issues in football.

programme.desc: Enjoy a selection of memorable goals scored by Dominik Szoboszlai.

programme.title: Goal Rush: U18 Season So Far
programme.desc: All the goals from Liverpool U18's 2025/26 season.

programme.title: Rush Scored Four
programme.desc: An LFC Original mini-documentary that relives the unforgettable afternoon at Goodison in 1982 when Ian Rush inspired the Reds to a famous 5-0 derby victory.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: The week's most popular videos and social media highlights from across the Club, its players and supporters.

programme.title: 130 Greatest LFC Goals
programme.desc: The complete countdown of Liverpool's most memorable goals; be it in terms of importance, iconic status or simply sheer quality - with the top 10 voted for by the fans.

programme.title: Robbo: My Liverpool
programme.desc: A brand-new, exclusive LFC Original documentary paying tribute to Andy Robertson and his remarkable nine-year journey at Liverpool.

programme.desc: A look back at some of Roberto Firmino's greatest goals.

programme.desc: The week's most popular videos and social media highlights from across the Club, its players and supporters.

programme.desc: To celebrate Mo Salah reaching 50 goals in European competition, enjoy his first half century of strikes from the Champions League & Europa League.

programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Golf tips, equipment reviews and golf course features.

programme.title: Giants Access Blue
programme.desc: Everything you need to know about your NY Giants.

programme.title: Live: FanDuel Racing
programme.desc: Live horse racing from around the country.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: From Colonial Country Club in Fort Worth, Texas.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Golf Channel's flagship news program, the nightly "Golf Central" presents highlights from the major golf tours and world events, plus reports and features from tournament sites.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Round 1 of the Colonial golf tournament begins at Colonial Country Club in Texas. Players tackle the renovated par-70 layout featuring reshaped greens and natural barrancas while precision iron play remains critical throughout the course.

programme.title: Live: DP World Tour Golf
programme.desc: The Austrian Alpine Open continues Round 2 at Golfclub Kitzbuhel-Schwarzsee-Reith. The top 65 players and ties advance past the 36-hole cut line. New tee boxes alter angles of attack as mid-tier competitors fight to secure a weekend paycheck.

programme.title: Live: LPGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: From Bay Course at Seaview in Galloway, N.J.

programme.title: Live: Golf Central Pregame
programme.desc: Golf Central Pregame preps viewers for all the tournament action, with up-to-date scores, interviews, and analysis.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The Colonial golf tournament continues Round 2 play at the Colonial Country Club. Competitors navigate the multi-million-dollar course renovation as they battle for the cut line. Justin Thomas and Ludvig Aberg headline the elite tournament field.

programme.title: Live: DP World Tour Golf
programme.desc: The Austrian Alpine Open begins Round 3 at Golfclub Kitzbuhel-Schwarzsee-Reith. Moving Day emphasizes positioning as golfers target higher-risk pin placements. Contenders take calculated risks to climb the leaderboard before Sunday.

programme.title: The Next Shot
programme.desc: Coach Nathalie Sheehan combines the lessons learned from golf's best coaches with her own approach to the game.

programme.title: The Next Shot
programme.desc: Nathalie demonstrates how to eliminate slicing with a draw path drill and shares a tip for hitting powerful fades.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Moving Day unfolds during Round 3 of the Colonial golf tournament in Fort Worth, Texas. Contenders attack the renovated par-70 layout while narrow fairways and firm greens force players to balance the risk against costly mistakes.

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. The contestant with the most points at the end of the game advances to play the bonus round, in which the contestant has a chance to win thousands of dollars, with the actual amount dependent on the rules in place at the time of

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Two teams of three compete to complete a chain of words after the first and last words in the chain are revealed.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Holding all the aces players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the close hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Aces For Everyone; players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants include Joel McHale, Rich Eisen, Jerry Ferrara and La La Anthony.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: A professional hairdresser from Cranston, R.I., plays for up to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Four million-dollar cases are on the board as contestants play to win cash; Aretha Franklin calls to support a music loving contestant; trainers Jillian Michaels and Bob Harper and casting director Bernard Telsey make special appearances.

programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Cousins Latoya and Free battle friends Brian and Bruce.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: Emma: Natural Relief for Bloating, Constipation & Gut Imbalance
programme.desc: Tired of bloating or gut issues that won't go away?; discovering the root cause-and how Emma can help eliminate methane-producing archaea, reset digestion and restore balance naturally.

programme.title: 1776 Gold & Silver!
programme.desc: Secure one of the extremely limited 2026 Gold or Silver Continental Dollars graded MS70 celebrating America's 250th Anniversary. With mintages of just 499 gold and 999 silver, even fewer were struck than the historic original 1776 Continental Dollar.

programme.title: Operation Smile
programme.desc: Transforming lives and bringing smiles to children around the world.

programme.title: 25 Words or Less
programme.desc: The show where every word counts! Hosted by Meredith Vieira, two teams of celebrities and civilians face off in a fast-paced word game with a top prize of $10,000.

programme.title: Beat the Bridge
programme.desc: An interactive bridge dares players to cross by stepping on the right answers to challenging trivia questions; each step forward puts money in the team's bank, with bonus money for each successful crossing.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Switch
programme.desc: Jeff Hephner challenges contestants who are ranked based on their answers to trivia questions for a chance at $10,000; every question counts, as each answer can propel them to the top or to the bottom, where they'll be in jeopardy of elimination.

programme.title: Split Second
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins presents three contestants with a question and three possible choices and whoever buzzes in fastest earns the right to answer first.

programme.title: Tic Tac Dough
programme.desc: Brooke Burns hosts this exciting remake of the iconic game show, as two contestants compete head-to-head, answering trivia questions to earn plays on a giant game board, while the mischievous dragon tries to outwit their every move.

programme.title: Bingo Blitz
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli hosts this dynamic game of knowledge, strategy, and luck, where contestants answer trivia questions to earn bingo balls and unlock power-ups in their quest for the $10,000 prize.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: Two teams of friends and family race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Tracey family vs Howard family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Tracey family vs. Lampe family.

programme.title: Family Feud Favorites
programme.desc: "Family Feud" has seen some crazy moments over the years, so buckle up as we revisit these fan favorites.

programme.title: Celebrity Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Amanda Seales, Snoop Dogg and Mark Duplass.

programme.title: Celebrity Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Utkarsh Ambudkar, Mira Sorvino and Lisa Ann Walter.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Father and daughter John and Toni from Antioch, Calif., contend with the wall, hoping they have what it takes to win big.

programme.title: The B1G Show
programme.desc: Highlights, news, and analysis from around the Big Ten.

programme.title: At The Plate
programme.desc: Get to know Minnesota baseball's Weber Neels. Nebraska's Ava Kuszak discusses her dream of becoming a veterinarian. Learn about Kaylynn Jones' journey to playing softball for Oregon. Hear from Northwestern quarterback and center fielder, Jack Lausch.

programme.title: The B1G Show
programme.desc: Highlights, news, and analysis from around the Big Ten.

programme.title: Maryland Football Classic
programme.desc: Javon Leake scores on a 97-yard kickoff return and rushes for another three touchdowns in the Terrapins' big win over the Fighting Illini. From Oct. 27, 2018.

programme.title: College Golf
programme.desc: Coverage of college golf action.

programme.title: The B1G Show
programme.desc: Highlights, news, and analysis from around the Big Ten.

programme.title: B1G Trailblazers
programme.desc: Former NFL coach and Minnesota athlete, Tony Dungy, sits down with Dave Revsine to discuss his path to winning a Super Bowl with the Indianapolis Colts and his legacy that goes beyond football.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: From Huntington Bank Stadium in Minneapolis.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: From Memorial Stadium in Lincoln, Neb.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: From Merchants Bank Field at Memorial Stadium in Bloomington, Ind.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: From Autzen Stadium in Eugene, Ore.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: From Michigan Stadium in Ann Arbor, Mich.

programme.title: The B1G Moment
programme.desc: Desmond Howard, his brother Jonathan, Marc Jacobson and Ohio State's Tim Williams look back at the events that led up to Howard's iconic touchdown run and Heisman pose in the end zone.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: From Ohio Stadium in Columbus, Ohio.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: From Husky Stadium in Seattle, Wash.

programme.title: UCLA Football Classic
programme.desc: From Sept. 14, 2013.

programme.title: UCLA Football Classic
programme.desc: From Sept. 4, 2021.

programme.title: At The Plate
programme.desc: See how Roch Cholowsky is chasing a storybook ending to his collegiate career with UCLA. Get to know Michigan baseball's Elie Kligman. Learn how Maryland's Aubrey Wurst is pursuing a future in broadcast journalism.

programme.title: At The Plate
programme.desc: Learn about Ava Carroll's journey to Washington. See how head coach Jake Boss Jr.'s father has continued to support him and the Michigan State baseball program. Get to know Wisconsin's Hilary and Addison Blomberg.

programme.title: Illinois Football Classic
programme.desc: Luke Altmeyer passed for a touchdown and ran in another score to help the 22nd-ranked Fighting Illini beat the 24th-ranked Wolverines, 21-7. From Oct. 19, 2024.

programme.title: Illinois Football Classic
programme.desc: Casey Washington catches the game-winning pass from Brandon Peters to secure the Fighting Illini a 20-18 victory over the 7th-ranked Nittany Lions in an unprecedented nine overtimes. From Oct. 23, 2021.

programme.title: At The Plate
programme.desc: Learn about Ava Carroll's journey to Washington. See how head coach Jake Boss Jr.'s father has continued to support him and the Michigan State baseball program. Get to know Wisconsin's Hilary and Addison Blomberg.

programme.title: At The Plate
programme.desc: See how Roch Cholowsky is chasing a storybook ending to his collegiate career with UCLA. Get to know Michigan baseball's Elie Kligman. Learn how Maryland's Aubrey Wurst is pursuing a future in broadcast journalism.

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: Championship.

programme.title: At The Plate
programme.desc: Get to know cousins and Ohio State baseball players, Henry Kaczmar and Mason Eckelman. Learn about the legacy of Iowa baseball dads and sons. Purdue's Anna Moore discusses the loss of her dad and her relationship with softball. Hear about Illinois Softball's mentality of Taking Care of Blue.

programme.title: At The Plate
programme.desc: Get to know USC baseball's Walter Urbon; learn about Indiana softball's Lil Sis program; how Peyton Bonds, nephew of Barry Bonds, embraces his family name while creating his own path at Rutgers; Penn State's Brooke Klosowicz's love for baking.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Football
programme.desc: Learn how USC quarterback Jayden Maiava's Polynesian heritage has influenced him. Find out how Oregon's Teitum Tuioti and his father, defensive line coach Tony Tuioti, balance football and family. See why Fernando Mendoza chose Indiana.

programme.title: Indiana Football Classic
programme.desc: Fernando Mendoza threw for 215 yards and a touchdown to help the 7th-ranked Hoosiers beat the 3rd-ranked Ducks, 30-20. From Oct. 11, 2025.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Football
programme.desc: Learn why Indiana's Aiden Fisher wears the number four. Get to know Rutgers kicker Jai Patel. See why Wisconsin's Ricardo Hallman never wavered during his career with the Badgers.

programme.title: B1G Football in 60
programme.desc: Fernando Mendoza threw for four touchdowns to lead the 2nd-ranked Hoosiers to a 31-7 victory over the Badgers. From Nov. 15, 2025.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Football
programme.desc: See how Iowa's Kamari Moulton transformed loss into on-field gains. Learn how Hank Beatty has become a stand-out receiver at Illinois. Discover what prepared Oregon's Dante Moore for success.

programme.title: Oregon Football Classic
programme.desc: Atticus Sappington kicked the game-winning field goal with three seconds remaining to lift the 9th-ranked Ducks to an 18-16 victory over the 20th-ranked Hawkeyes. From Nov. 8, 2025.

programme.title: Michigan Football Classic
programme.desc: Blake Corum and Donovan Edwards rushed for a combined 238 yards and four touchdowns to help lead the top-ranked Wolverines to victory over the 2nd-ranked Huskies and capture the program's first national championship since 1997. From Jan. 8, 2024.

programme.title: Ohio State Football Classic
programme.desc: Will Howard passed for two touchdowns and Quinshon Judkins rushed for 100 yards and two touchdowns to help the 8th-ranked Buckeyes defeat the 7th-ranked Fighting Irish, 34-23, to win the program's sixth national title. From Jan. 20, 2025.

programme.title: Indiana Football Classic
programme.desc: Fernando Mendoza passed for 222 yards and a touchdown in the 2nd-ranked Hoosiers' 13-10 victory over the top-ranked Buckeyes to claim Indiana's first Big Ten Championship since 1967. From Dec. 6, 2025.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: From Ohio Stadium in Columbus, Ohio.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Football
programme.desc: Julian Sayin's journey to becoming Ohio State's starting quarterback. Get to know wide receiver Jeremiah Smith. Plus, highlights from the Buckeyes' victory over the Wolverines.

programme.desc: Action from college wrestling matches and tournaments.

programme.desc: Session two.

programme.title: ACC PM
programme.desc: Tune into ACC Network's daily news and information show - with the biggest storylines and best guests from across the ACC.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: Original content and storytelling that focuses on student-athlete features from a variety of the conference's 27 varsity sports.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by SMU Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 SMU Mustangs.

programme.desc: Providing the latest news and information on the ACC's 28 sponsored sports - including post-game coverage around the conference's biggest events.

programme.desc: Providing the latest news and information on the ACC's 28 sponsored sports - including post-game coverage around the conference's biggest events.

programme.title: College Softball
programme.desc: Championship.

programme.title: Women's College Basketball
programme.desc: The Cardinals and Blue Devils clash in a massive ACC Championship showdown. Louisville enters on a solid two-game winning streak, while Duke brings their own late-season momentum. The ultimate ACC conference crown is on the line today.

programme.desc: Providing the latest news and information on the ACC's 28 sponsored sports - including post-game coverage around the conference's biggest events.
